hero.title: Join the Punishers Germany Family!
hero.description: Whether you're an aspiring esports athlete, a creative content creator, or simply a passionate fan - we want you!

player.title: As a Player
player.description: You're a talented esports athlete looking for a professional environment to take your skills to the next level? Apply now for our teams!

creator.title: As a Content Creator
creator.description: You love creating content, sharing your passion, and building a community? Join our creator team and grow with us!

community.title: As a Community Member
community.description: Join our growing Discord community, meet like-minded people, chat, and never miss any news or events!

application.heading: Ready to Take the Next Step?
application.description: We can't wait to meet you! Use our application form or contact us directly.
